rules.description: Generate a structured workout with warmup, main sets, and cooldown
Nutrition planning with macro targets, meal timing, and supplement guidance
Log and review training progress, measurements, and personal records
Design a multi-week training program with periodization
Look up exercise details: form cues, variations, muscles worked, common mistakes
Suggest a meal or snack fitting current macro targets and preferences
Recovery assessment: sleep, deload timing, active recovery, stress management
Celebrate and log a new personal record
